name: Signed Reviews Knowledge Agent
description: Signed Reviews is a processor-attested review verification platform. We do not currently expose an A2A agent. Agent-readable content is available via llms.txt, Markdown for Agents, and Agent Skills.

skills.name: Verification Spectrum Guide
skills.description: Explains the 5-level review verification spectrum from email-based to processor-attested

supportedInterfaces.description: Text-based interaction via llms.txt and Markdown for Agents content negotiation
